__fixture__.name: start_center_unsupported_envelope
__fixture__.scenario: Managed-fleet machine whose admin-policy envelope forbids Import, Restore, and template / prebuild paths (air-gapped mirror only). The Start Center enters privacy_reduction_mode = hide_all_except_open_and_clone and narrows primary_action_refs to Open folder and Clone repository only (the narrowed set is still reachable via keyboard). A blocking policy_state_disclosure banner renders in disclosure_band above primary_work_resume with account_opt_in_posture = unavailable_in_this_envelope and resolution_hooks continue_in_restricted_mode and set_up_later. The build_channel_identity banner still renders in help_and_build_identity_footer because build identity is required on every state including takeovers. disclosed_narrowing_reason = unsupported_envelope pins the narrowing so a support export can reconstruct why only two actions were advertised. Composes with docs/ux/entry_restore_truth_audit.md §6.9 startup_state:unsupported_startup and §11 seeded-state matrix unsupported_startup row.

presentation_subtitle: Policy envelope narrows this launch to Open folder and Clone repository.
